title: aspalathus ericifolia subsp. minuta
intro: Aspalathus ericifolia subsp. minuta, commonly known as Rooibos Dwarf, is a small, shrub-like plant belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high antioxidant content, which helps in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Aspalathus ericifolia subsp. minuta include reducing the risk of certain cancers, improving heart health, and providing relief from digestive issues. Rooibos Dwarf is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is also available in capsule or powder form as a dietary supplement.
